# thriftedBD

thriftedBD is an online thrifted/secondhand clothing e-commerce platform based in Bangladesh.

## What we sell

Quality-checked, imported preloved fashion sourced from Korea, Japan, Taiwan, and China. Every piece is unique — no duplicate SKUs. Items are individually inspected before listing.

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://thriftedbd.com
- All products: https://thriftedbd.com/products
- Cart: https://thriftedbd.com/cart

## Delivery & payment

- Cash on delivery (COD) — nationwide across Bangladesh
- bKash and Nagad online payment also accepted
- Delivery via Steadfast or Pathao courier
- Tracking link sent after dispatch

## How orders work

1. Customer browses and adds to bag on the website
2. Checkout with name, phone, and address (no account required)
3. thriftedBD calls to confirm the order before dispatch
4. Parcel is dispatched via courier with a tracking link
5. Customer pays cash on delivery to the courier

## Contact

Facebook: https://facebook.com/thriftedbd
